projects.name: 2026 Direct Spend Study
projects.notes: State of the Industry Study in partnership with Coupa. 125 respondents — Director level+ from $750M+ revenue orgs. Industries: Discrete Manufacturing, Process Manufacturing, Transportation & Logistics. Regions: North America and Europe (UK, Germany, France).

deliverables.name: Kick Off Deck
deliverables.notes: Project kick-off deck shared with Coupa.

deliverables.name: Survey Draft Shared
deliverables.notes: Initial survey draft shared with Coupa for feedback.

deliverables.name: Survey Design (Finalized)
deliverables.notes: Finalize Survey — Incisiv + Coupa.

deliverables.name: Field Survey Launch
deliverables.notes: Survey goes live in the field.

deliverables.name: Survey Fieldwork & Analysis — Close Survey
deliverables.notes: Survey closes and fieldwork analysis wraps up.

deliverables.name: Data Readout — Aggregate + 3 Industry Readouts
deliverables.notes: Shared with Coupa team on Jan 9-10 per email thread. Marked complete.

deliverables.name: Playbook Draft for Review
deliverables.notes: Incisiv delivers draft playbook to Coupa for review.

deliverables.name: Playbook Feedback from Coupa
deliverables.notes: Coupa to provide feedback on playbook draft.

deliverables.name: Final Playbook (Flagship Report)
deliverables.notes: State of the Industry Flagship Report — turnkey design and production.

logs.message: Project auto-created by Claude. Scanned: Kickoff PDF + 2 email threads.
Extracted 9 deliverables. Start: Feb 4 2026. Final delivery: Apr 13 2026.
Extracted 7 stakeholders from email threads (Incisiv + Coupa teams).
Data Readout marked complete — confirmed shared with client per email thread.

projects.name: 2026 Global Executive Research (CXO Study)
projects.notes: Global CXO Research Program in partnership with Manhattan and World Retail Congress (WRC). Session title: 'Inside the CEO Agenda: The Trends Redefining Retail's Next Five Years'. Presented at WRC, Intercontinental Hotel Berlin, Apr 27–29, 2026. Content session slot: Tuesday Apr 29, 11:30–11:50.

deliverables.name: Kick Off
deliverables.notes: Project kick-off with Incisiv, Manhattan and WRC teams.

deliverables.name: Feedback from Manhattan
deliverables.notes: Survey feedback and PR alignment confirmed.

deliverables.name: Finalise Survey
deliverables.notes: Incisiv and WRC synced before finalising.

deliverables.name: Field Survey
deliverables.notes: Survey goes live in the field.

deliverables.name: Content Session – Structure & Format
deliverables.notes: Fireside chat format; Manhattan pushing to schedule. Basic structure due before final slides. Ref: Imogen email – Apr 7.

deliverables.name: DPA Sign-off
deliverables.notes: WRC = controller, Incisiv = processor. WRC passes download registrations to Incisiv to qualify for Manhattan. Ref: Imogen email – Apr 10.

deliverables.name: Registration Fields Confirmation
deliverables.notes: Confirm standard fields + qualifying question for Manhattan. WRC fields: Name, Job title, Company, Country, Email, Phone (optional), Are you a retailer? Ref: Imogen email – Apr 10.

deliverables.name: Front Cover (Designed) + QR Code
deliverables.notes: Required for onsite signage and WRC promotions. WRC deadline – Apr 13.

deliverables.name: PR Alignment with Manhattan
deliverables.notes: Align on key messaging once first findings available. Manhattan already pushing to schedule.

deliverables.name: Close Survey
deliverables.notes: Survey fieldwork closes.

deliverables.name: Data Readout & Key Insights Prep
deliverables.notes: Data preview ASAP; focus on key insights for the WRC session.

deliverables.name: Social Assets
deliverables.notes: Incisiv to create and share with WRC. WRC deadline – Apr 22.

deliverables.name: Landing Pages & Registration Forms
deliverables.notes: Ready for full report launch at Congress. WRC deadline – Apr 22.

deliverables.name: Content Session – Final Slides
deliverables.notes: Final slides for Congress session. Align with key findings from data readout.

deliverables.name: Full Digital eBook Upload
deliverables.notes: Full report uploaded to WRC platform. WRC to host; download leads passed to Incisiv for Manhattan qualification. WRC upload deadline – Apr 24.

deliverables.name: Key Insights & eBook at WRC
deliverables.notes: Full eBook available at Congress. Session presents headline findings. Congress: Apr 27–29.

deliverables.name: Promotion at WRC
deliverables.notes: Supporting posts tagging WRC and Manhattan. Schedule to be built. Congress: Apr 27–29.

deliverables.name: Promotion after WRC
deliverables.notes: Post-event promotion by Incisiv, Manhattan and WRC. Confirm delivery date.
